mapper.sql: SELECT a.*, d.name AS dept_name FROM athlete a LEFT JOIN department d ON a.dept_id = d.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO athlete (student_no, name, gender, dept_id, phone) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{deptId}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE athlete SET student_no=#{studentNo}, name=#{name}, gender=#{gender}, dept_id=#{deptId}, phone=#{phone} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM athlete WHERE dept_id = #{deptId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration WHERE athlete_id = #{athleteId}
